headline: Morgan Stanley (MS) Stock Looks Above Fair Value Today
summary: Morgan Stanley stock has delivered a very strong 186.2% total return over the past 5 years, yet the core valuation checks now suggest investors are paying a premium to own it, with the Excess Returns intrinsic value estimate pointing to a richer price tag than the current fundamentals fully support. A 186.2% 5 year return signals that long term holders have already captured substantial gains, which can reduce the margin of safety for new buyers at today’s valuation. Growing reliance on...

headline: Will Fresh Bond Issuance and Higher Estimates Shift Morgan Stanley's (MS) Earnings Power Narrative?
summary: In early July 2026, Morgan Stanley issued a series of fixed-rate, unsecured global medium-term notes across maturities from 2027 to 2033, while also completing a US$50.6 million 4.450% senior note due 2027. At the same time, analysts raised earnings and revenue estimates for Morgan Stanley ahead of its upcoming results, with growing attention on how its capital-raising in bonds and complex structured products aligns with expectations for expanding Institutional Securities and Wealth...
